report.title: UKSI taxon ranks for TanHub
report.description: A list of UKSI taxon ranks for TanHub.
report.query: SELECT #columns# FROM taxon_ranks tr -- Limit to ranks used in the list. JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttl ON tr.id=cttl.taxon_rank_id AND cttl.taxon_list_id=#taxon_list_id# WHERE tr.deleted=false AND tr.rank in (#taxon_ranks#)

param.name: taxon_list_id
param.description: ID of the taxon list to load higher taxa for.

param.name: taxon_ranks
param.description: Ranks of the taxa to load higher taxa for, quoted CSV.
